message:
fix: VFS docs/seek test, obligation tracker hardening, harness state fixes, rate_limit extensions

VFS (fs/vfs.rs):
  - Updated module-level docs to remove references to a hypothetical
    MemoryVfs that was never implemented; now describes the trait as
    supporting "alternate implementations"
  - VfsFile and Vfs trait docs updated similarly
  - unix_vfs_file_seek test strengthened: now seeks to offset 3 and
    reads the tail ("3456789") instead of just reading the full file,
    actually exercising the seek functionality
  - Added AsyncSeekExt import for the test

Symbol obligation tracker (record/symbol_obligation_tracker.rs):
  Extended tracking coverage with additional validation and edge-case
  handling in obligation lifecycle transitions.

Lab network harness (lab/network/harness.rs):
  - handle_spawn_ack: refactored nested closure to chained and_then,
    added guard preventing late Rejected acks from clobbering Running
    state
  - handle_terminal_result: take tx before updating state to avoid
    sending on a consumed channel
  - Tests: late_rejected_spawn_ack_does_not_clobber_running_remote_handle,
    duplicate_terminal_result_does_not_overwrite_completed_state

Rate limiter (service/rate_limit.rs):
  Extended shared-state rate limiter with additional test coverage and
  documentation for the reservation lifecycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
